Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to analyze each case sequence against the normative description

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets break down the rules Process always begins with Receive order After Receive next is Check inventory

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: There are two possible paths If inventory is sufficient then the sequence should be Receive Check Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order If inventory is insufficient then sequence Receive Check Cancel order Close order

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Additional constraints Authorize payment only after Check inventory and before packaging Package items only after authorization and before shipping Ship order only after packaging and never after a cancellation Close order final in all scenarios

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 1 Receive order Check inventory Authorize payment Package items Ship order Close order This matches exactly the sufficient inventory path No violations

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 2 Receive order Check inventory Package items Authorize payment Ship order Close order According to sufficient path they should authorize before packaging Here packaging occurs before authorization The description says Authorize payment should only occur after Check inventory and before packaging and Package items should only occur after authorization and before shipping So Case 2 violates

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 3 Receive order Check inventory Authorize payment Cancel order Ship order Close order After check they authorize then cancel then ship According to description if inventory is insufficient they should cancel directly if sufficient they should authorize then package then ship Here cancellation after authorization is not allowed and shipping after cancellation is prohibited and packaging is missing So Case 3 violates

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 4 Receive order Check inventory Cancel order Close order This matches insufficient inventory path Receive Check Cancel Close So Case 4 is fine

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Case 5 Receive order Check inventory Authorize payment Ship order Close order Missing Package items between Authorize and Ship Package is required before shipping so Case 5 violates

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus violations cases 2 3 5 Case 1 and 4 are compliant
